zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham於1512年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Sir Richard Lyster33歲，母親Monica O’Hagen27歲。她於從1528年1月11日到1529年1月10日與Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham在英國奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1582年1月2日在英國奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆享年70歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham于1512年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Sir Richard Lyster33岁，母亲Monica O’Hagen27岁。她于从1528年1月11日到1529年1月10日与Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham在英国奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1582年1月2日在英国奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆享年70岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: lyster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Ljøsta in Romsdal, probably derived from Old Norse ljóstr ‘fishing spear, leister’.
Danish: nickname originally from Bornholm, derived from a word for a fishing tackle for catching eel.

variants.name: Lister
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham was born in 1512, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Lyster, was 33 and her mother, Monica O’Hagen, was 27. She married Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham from 11 January 1528 to 10 January 1529, in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 2 January 1582, in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham est née en 1512, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Lyster, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Monica O’Hagen, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham du 11 janvier 1528 au 10 janvier 1529, à Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 janvier 1582, à Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham 1512 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Lyster 33 und ihre Mutter Monica O’Hagen 27. Sie hat von 11. Januar 1528 bis 10. Januar 1529 in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Januar 1582 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham è nata il nel 1512 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Lyster, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Monica O’Hagen, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham da 11 gennaio 1528 a 10 gennaio 1529, nel Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 2 gennaio 1582, nel Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurhamが1512年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Lysterは33歳，母Monica O’Hagenは27歳であった。から1528年1月11日まで1529年1月10日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアマプレドウルハムでSir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1582年1月2日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアマプレドウルハムで70歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアマプレドウルハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham(이)가 1512년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Lyster(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Monica O’Hagen(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1528년 1월 11일부터 1529년 1월 10일까지 영국 스퍼드실르 마플레더람에서 Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1582년 1월 2일 영국 스퍼드실르 마플레더람에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 마플레더람에 묻혔다.

pt.1528: de 11 de janeiro de 1528 a 10 de janeiro de 1529
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham nasceu em 1512, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Lyster, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Monica O’Hagen, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham de 11 de janeiro de 1528 a 10 de janeiro de 1529, em Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1582, em Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham родилась в 1512 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Lyster было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Monica O’Hagen, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham с 11 января 1528 по 10 января 1529 в местности мапледурам, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 2 января 1582 г. в местности мапледурам, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности мапледурам, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.1528: desde 11 de enero de 1528 hasta 10 de enero de 1529
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady elizabeth lyster , 2nd baroness van mapledurham nació en 1512, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Lyster, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Monica O’Hagen, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir richard le blount of iver , 2nd baronet van mapledurham desde 11 de enero de 1528 hasta 10 de enero de 1529, en Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 2 de enero de 1582, en Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
